arguments.argument:
event_inherited() setCollisionBounds(-2,-2,2,2)
damageType="SPECIAL" weaponTag=12 atkLv=global.stMega_Gravity[0] atkPower=round((45+round(global.stMega_Gravity[0]*1.5)+global.skillTree[10])/2) atkPower=weaponDmgMod(0,atkPower) stunTime=4
bCanHitSwitch=0 bulletSpeed=14 lifeTime=40 lingerFrame=0 alarm[0]=1
